news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: DeFiLlama数据显示，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主要受新晋DEX交易量增长推动。
news.summary_en: Solana's total DeFi TVL increased 12% this week, driven by growing trading volumes on new DEXs, according to DeFiLlama.

news.title_zh: Cardano 2026年Plutus V4升级路线图公布
news.title_en: Cardano Unveils Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4技术路线图，预计Q3上线主网，将增强智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 technical roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3. The upgrade will enhance smart contract expressiveness and reduce transaction fees.

news.title_zh: Chainlink CCIP新增支持五条公链
news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for Five Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism五条主流公链。
news.summary_en: Chainlink’s Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding multi-chain connectivity.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币拟引入ZK-Rollup扩容方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Proposes ZK-Rollup Layer2 Scaling Solution
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会发布草案，探讨基于ZK-Rollup的Layer2方案，旨在降低小额转账手续费。
news.summary_en: The Dogecoin Foundation released a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution to reduce transaction fees for micro-payments.
